name.jp: 高機動シーケンス稼働【凍結】

description.en: Increases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> of an ally, and has a <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Frozen</color> on the enemy target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 아군 한 명의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 증가시키고, <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> 확률로 적 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>빙결</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.jp: 味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>をUPさせ、敵単体に<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>凍結</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 使1名友军的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,并有<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>的几率使敌人陷入<color=#28d9ed>冰冻</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

name.jp: コアオーバードライブ

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> at the start of battle.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n在战斗开始时,使<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。
